title: Fix 20% error in GPU energy tracking

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We can't have assertions run on GPU. This PR moves an assertion outside of `interpol`, which is run on GPU. This will fix this [longrun GPU error](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/617#018ede33-3bc8-4814-8954-9ab3684dbee4).
title: make `interpol` GPU compatible
